reference.Acrobatics: DEX. Stay on your feet in a tricky situation — balancing on ice or a ship's deck — or pull off a tumble, flip, or escape from a grapple.
reference.Animal Handling: WIS. Calm a spooked mount, keep a beast from bolting, intuit an animal's intentions, or control a trained creature.
reference.Arcana: INT. Recall lore about spells, magic items, eldritch symbols, planar travel, and the inhabitants of the planes.
reference.Athletics: STR. Cover difficult physical activity — climbing, jumping, and swimming — and most attempts to grapple or shove a creature.
reference.Deception: CHA. Convincingly hide the truth, whether through misdirection, a false identity, or a straight-faced lie.
reference.History: INT. Recall lore about historic events, legendary people, ancient kingdoms, past disputes, and lost civilizations.
reference.Insight: WIS. Determine the true intentions of a creature — read body language, speech habits, and changes in mannerisms to detect a lie.
reference.Intimidation: CHA. Influence someone through overt threats, hostile actions, or menacing presence.
reference.Investigation: INT. Deduce the location of a hidden object, discern a clue's meaning, or work out a trap's mechanism from available evidence.
reference.Medicine: WIS. Stabilize a dying companion or diagnose an illness.
reference.Nature: INT. Recall lore about terrain, plants and animals, the weather, and natural cycles.
reference.Perception: WIS. Spot, hear, or otherwise detect the presence of something. Your passive Perception is 10 + your Perception bonus.
reference.Performance: CHA. Delight an audience with music, dance, acting, storytelling, or some other entertainment.
reference.Persuasion: CHA. Influence someone with tact, social grace, or good nature — negotiate, inspire goodwill, or act in good faith.
reference.Religion: INT. Recall lore about deities, rites and prayers, religious hierarchies, holy symbols, and the practices of secret cults.
reference.Sleight of Hand: DEX. Perform legerdemain or manual trickery — plant something on someone, conceal an object, or pick a pocket.
reference.Stealth: DEX. Conceal yourself from enemies, slink past guards, slip away unnoticed, or sneak up without being seen or heard.
reference.Survival: WIS. Follow tracks, hunt game, guide your group through wastes, identify signs of nearby creatures, or predict the weather.
reference.Heroic Inspiration: A 2024 reward, given freely by the GM for great roleplay or by some species/feats on a long rest. Spend it to reroll any d20 — you must take the new result. You either have it or you don't; it doesn't stack.
reference.Proficiency Bonus: Added to ability checks, saving throws, and attack rolls you're proficient with. It scales with total level: +2 at 1st, rising to +6 by 17th.
reference.Passive Perception: Your always-on awareness, used by the GM to see what you notice without rolling: 10 + your Perception bonus (plus 5 with advantage, minus 5 with disadvantage).
reference.Death Saves: At 0 HP, roll a d20 at the start of each turn: 10+ is a success, 9 or lower a failure (a 1 counts as two failures, a 20 restores 1 HP). Three successes and you stabilize; three failures and you die. Any damage while at 0 HP is an automatic failure (a critical hit is two).
reference.Hit Dice: Spend a Hit Die on a Short Rest to roll and recover HP equal to the roll plus your Constitution modifier. You regain half your spent dice (rounded up) on a Long Rest.
reference.Size: Most player characters are Medium or Small. Size affects which spaces you can squeeze into and which mounts you can ride.
